fun_facts: Linux was created by Linus Torvalds in 1991 as a hobby project while he was a student at the University of Helsinki.
The name 'Linux' comes from Linus Torvalds' first name combined with 'Unix', the operating system that inspired it.
Tux the penguin became the official mascot of Linux in 1996 after Linus Torvalds chose it following his encounter with a penguin.
Unix systems use the concept of 'everything is a file', treating devices, directories, and processes as files in the filesystem.
The '/' character is used as the root directory separator in Unix/Linux file paths, while Windows uses backslashes.
Unix timestamps count seconds since January 1, 1970 (the Unix epoch), which will cause a problem on January 19, 2038.
The Linux kernel source code is over 20 million lines long and is maintained by thousands of developers worldwide.
Unix permissions are represented by three digits (owner, group, other) with read (4), write (2), and execute (1) values.
Bell Labs created Unix in 1969, and it became the foundation for modern operating systems including Linux, macOS, and BSD.
Linux is the most used operating system in the world, powering everything from smartphones (Android) to supercomputers and web servers.
jokes: Why do programmers prefer dark mode? Because light attracts bugs!
Why do Java developers wear glasses? Because they can't C#!
How many programmers does it take to change a light bulb? None, that's a hardware problem.
Why was the computer late? It had a hard drive.
How did the hacker escape the police? He just ransomware.
Why do programmers hate nature? It has too many bugs.
Why did the developer go broke? Because he used up all his cache.
How do you comfort a JavaScript bug? You console it.
If microsoft ever does something that doesn't suck, it will be a vacuum cleaner.
Linus_quotes:
A computer is like air conditioning - it becomes useless when you open windows. 
 ~ Linus Torvalds

Intelligence is the ability to avoid doing work, yet getting the work done. 
 ~ Linus Torvalds

Those that can, do. Those that can't, complain. 
 ~ Linus Torvalds

I like offending people, because I think people who get offended should be offended. 
 ~ Linus Torvalds

Talk is cheap. Show me the code. 
 ~ Linus Torvalds

Most of the good programmers do programming not because they expect to get paid or get adulation by the public, but because it is fun to program. 
 ~ Linus Torvalds

Bad programmers worry about the code. Good programmers worry about data structures and their relationships. 
 ~ Linus Torvalds

Avoiding complexity reduces bugs. 
 ~ Linus Torvalds

If Microsoft ever does applications for Linux it means I've won. 
 ~ Linus Torvalds

My name is Linus, and I am your God. 
 ~ Linus Torvalds
Linux_quotes:
The Linux philosophy is 'laugh in the face of danger'. Oops. Wrong one. 'Do it yourself'. That's it. 
 ~ Linus Torvalds

We all know Linux is great...it does infinite loops in 5 seconds. 
 ~ Linus Torvalds

All the best people in life seem to like LINUX. 
 ~ Steve Wozniak

Oh, I've seen copies [of Linux Journal] around the terminal room at The Labs.

Cosmoe works on any of the standard filesystems available for Linux.

A multithreaded file system is only a performance hack.
